arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role.

assume_role_policy.description: The policy that grants an entity permission to assume the role.

create_date.description: The date and time when the IAM role was created.

description.description: A description of the IAM role's purpose.

id.description: The ID of the IAM role.

max_session_duration.description: The maximum session duration (in seconds) for the role.

path.description: The path to the IAM role.

permissions_boundary.description: The ARN of the policy that is used to set the permissions boundary for the role.

role_last_used.description: Information about the last time the role was used, including date and region.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the IAM role.

unique_id.description: The unique identifier for the IAM role.
